rail.text:
First Warning
            Smoke appears
            A small clue becomes the entry point.
          
          Cold JointJoint Problem

First Warning
            Warning becomes the question
            A small clue becomes the entry point.
          
          Cold JointJoint Problem
          Challenger did not fail because the danger was invisible. The Rogers Commission identified the physical failure, the joint between the two lower segments of the right solid rocket motor.

caption.text: Challenger did not fail because the danger was invisible. The Rogers Commission identified the physical failure, the joint between the two lower segments of the right solid rocket motor.

rail.text:
Cold Joint
            System had seen risk
            Cold changes how the seal responds.
          
          First WarningJoint ProblemWarning Becomes Process
          The solid rocket boosters were built from large cylindrical segments.

caption.text: The solid rocket boosters were built from large cylindrical segments.

rail.text:
Joint Problem
            Prior O-ring damage
            Known damage becomes operating history.
          
          First WarningCold JointWarning Becomes ProcessProcessed Warning
          Inspection found primary O-ring erosion in the right solid rocket booster aft field joint.

caption.text: Inspection found primary O-ring erosion in the right solid rocket booster aft field joint.

rail.text:
Warning Becomes Process
            Constraint becomes negotiable
            Damage is translated into procedure.
          
          Cold JointJoint ProblemProcessed WarningLaunch-Night Decision
          By the time January 27th arrived, launch was not pushing against a fresh warning.

caption.text: By the time January 27th arrived, launch was not pushing against a fresh warning.

rail.text:
Processed Warning
            Survived flight ambiguity
            Familiar risk starts to feel normal.
          
          Joint ProblemWarning Becomes ProcessLaunch-Night DecisionRecommendation Reversal

Launch-Night Decision
            Prove absolute failure
            Evidence must prove more than concern.
          
          Warning Becomes ProcessProcessed WarningRecommendation ReversalRoutine Pressure

Recommendation Reversal
            Launch morning chain
            The same chain returns a new answer.
          
          Processed WarningLaunch-Night DecisionRoutine Pressure
          The same pattern had been playing out administratively.

caption.text: The same pattern had been playing out administratively.

rail.text:
Routine Pressure
            Next case: Therac-25
            Memory loses control over behavior.
          
          Launch-Night DecisionRecommendation Reversal

Launch-Night Decision
            Low-temperature concern
            Evidence must prove more than concern.
          
          Warning Becomes ProcessProcessed WarningRecommendation ReversalRoutine Pressure
          Theokol engineers were worried about low temperature and O-ring performance.

caption.text: Theokol engineers were worried about low temperature and O-ring performance.
